next_action: Continue in Evidence mode: collect arm outputs, score them against this ground truth, refresh the current demo shelf, and then close or update polylogue-jxe.2.

open_threads.summary: Run the two-arm pack-vs-raw protocol and preserve the paired outputs and metrics.
Turn paired outputs into a comparison artifact with honest n caveats and a cold-reader gate.
Make declarative read-package regeneration single-process and progress-visible.
Self-healing degraded SQLite state remains tracked but is not the current campaign slice.

risks: n=1 pilot cannot support a general uplift claim.
The raw-ref arm may reconstruct by running its own archive queries, so this tests bounded handoff packet versus raw reference with normal tools.
Both agents share repository/tooling environment and may have unobserved priors.
polylogued is intentionally inactive for the current branch-local proof; this is not a convergence proof.
